ideation: This sequence will animate the robot mimicking the movement of a squid, focusing on the tentacles' motion.  The arms will move in a fluid, almost wave-like manner, suggesting the squid's undulating tentacles.  The animation will not be a literal depiction of a squid, but rather an interpretation of its movement using the robot's arm capabilities.  We'll use a combination of joint1 (roll) and joint2 (pitch) to achieve a sense of flow and undulation. The wrists will remain relatively neutral, focusing the expressiveness on the larger arm movements.

frames.beat: arms sway gently outwards, like tentacles unfurling
arms sweep inwards and upwards, a fluid undulation
arms sway gently outwards again, a rhythmic pulse
arms settle slightly, a subtle tentacle drift
